utterances.speaker: Project Manager
utterances.text: Welcome everyone to the trading system project kickoff meeting. Our goal is to build a high-performance trading platform.

utterances.speaker: Business Analyst
utterances.text: The business requirements include real-time data processing, order management, and risk assessment capabilities.

utterances.speaker: Lead Developer
utterances.text: From a technical perspective, we're looking at a microservices architecture with event-driven communication.

utterances.speaker: Security Expert
utterances.text: Security is paramount. We need encryption, authentication, and comprehensive audit logging.

utterances.speaker: Project Manager
utterances.text: The timeline is aggressive - we have 6 months to deliver the MVP with core trading functionality.

utterances.speaker: Business Analyst
utterances.text: We need to prioritize features. Order entry and execution are critical, portfolio management can come in phase 2.

utterances.speaker: Lead Developer
utterances.text: I suggest we start with the order processing service and build out from there. We'll need a robust message queue.

utterances.speaker: Security Expert
utterances.text: Let's not forget compliance requirements. We need to ensure all transactions are properly logged and auditable.
